parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human presenter with natural movements, breathing, and speech patterns. The lighting, shadows, and background details are consistent and realistic, lacking any AI-generated artifacts.

characters.appearance: Male, late 20s, slim build, light brown complexion. Short dark curly hair, short beard, wearing round black-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: White short-sleeve t-shirt with subtle grid pattern, black lavalier mic, smartwatch with blue band, silver ring, red string bracelet.

scenes.setting: Home office, daytime, wooden bookshelf with books and a plant, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits indoors, facing the camera directly. Behind him is a light-colored wooden bookshelf holding books, a framed drawing, and a potted plant. The lighting is soft and even, suggesting natural daylight. Character A gestures with both hands as he speaks. The composition is a standard medium close-up.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter introduces the app in a talking-head shot. Text overlays appear with the app name and key phrases. The overall vibe is energetic and informative.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: All right, this is one of my favorite AI productivity apps.
Character A says: I use it all the time on my Mac.
Character A says: It is called Wispr Flow, and it's an amazing, blazingly fast voice-to-transcription software.
Character A says: That's amazing for when you're using AI tools.
scenes.on_screen_text:
This is one of my favourite AI Productivity Apps
Wispr Flow
amazing, blazingly fast dictation software

scenes.setting: Home office, daytime, wooden bookshelf with books and a plant, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A continues speaking directly to the camera in the same setting. The background remains the wooden bookshelf with books and a plant. He uses his hands to emphasize points, pointing index fingers up. The framing is slightly tighter than before. The lighting remains consistent and natural.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter explains how to use the app. Graphic overlays show a typing versus speaking comparison with small inset videos. A voice waveform graphic appears when he mentions speaking.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Instead of having to type to the AI, you can instead just speak to the AI.
Character A says: Basically, you just hold down like the function key on your Mac, and then you speak whatever you want.
Character A says: And like, insanely quickly, it will transcribe whatever you've said, and sort of insanely fast, just like put it in whatever window you've got highlighted.
scenes.on_screen_text:
TYPE
SPEAK
and then you speak whatever you want. And like, insanely quickly, that will transcribe whatever you said, and then will sort of insanely fast just like, put it in whatever window you've got highlighted

scenes.setting: Home office, daytime, wooden bookshelf with books and a plant, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is framed in a medium close-up, speaking to the camera. The background is the same wooden bookshelf. He actively gestures, counting off points on his fingers. His expression is engaged and explanatory. The lighting highlights his face clearly against the background.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter lists the benefits of the app. Numbered text overlays appear on screen highlighting features like punctuation and backtracking. The visual style remains consistent with previous scenes.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: This is way better than the built-in dictation that you have in the Mac.
Character A says: It understands punctuation.
Character A says: It's got this like backtrack feature where if you make a mistake mid-sentence, you don't need to interrupt your flow.
Character A says: It will actually just recognize you've made the mistake and sort of present you with like the correct version.
scenes.on_screen_text:
1 way better than the built in dictation
2 understands punctuation
3 backtrack feature

scenes.setting: Home office, daytime, wooden bookshelf with books and a plant, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: The camera zooms in slightly to a closer shot of Character A's face and shoulders. The background is more out of focus but still shows the bookshelf. He speaks earnestly, using subtle hand gestures near his chest. His facial expressions are more pronounced due to the tighter framing. The lighting remains soft.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter compares typing speed to speaking speed. The camera zooms in slightly for emphasis. Text overlays emphasize his points about stopping typing and starting speaking.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: And even though I type pretty fast at like 150 words per minute, I speak way faster than I type, as do most people.
Character A says: And so especially when working with other AI tools, you should really stop typing and instead start speaking to the AI.
scenes.on_screen_text:
you should really stop typing
and instead start speaking to the AI

scenes.setting: Home office, daytime, wooden bookshelf with books and a plant, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: The camera zooms back out to the original medium close-up framing. Character A speaks directly to the camera, gesturing to encourage the viewer. The background remains the consistent wooden bookshelf setting. He smiles slightly as he delivers the final message. The composition is balanced and professional.

scenes.visual_description: The presenter gives a call to action. A URL and promo code appear as text overlays on the screen. The video ends on a positive, encouraging note.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: If you are interested in checking it out, head over to wisprflow.ai/ali.
Character A says: And if you use the code Ali, you will get a month completely for free.
Character A says: So you can try it out and see how much it drastically boosts your productivity.
scenes.on_screen_text:
wisprflow.ai/ali
use the code "ali"
and get 1 month free!
